display.purpose: Page titles, balances, and decisive numerical values.

body.purpose: Navigation, field labels, transaction guidance, and supporting copy.

shadows.name: panel
shadows.purpose: Quiet separation for primary workflow surfaces.

shadows.name: dialog
shadows.purpose: Focused elevation for transaction progress dialogs.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Short, calm state transitions and page entry.

components.name: Primary Transaction Button
components.description: Commits the current invest, redeem, stake, faucet, or reward action.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 52px; padding: 0 24px; border: 0; border-radius: 12px; background: #2559D6; color: #FFFFFF; font: 700 15px Manrope, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 10px 22px rgba(37,89,214,.18); transition: background-color 180ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1), transform 180ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1746BA; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Amount Input
components.description: Large numerical input paired with balance and token context.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 10px; color: #17233D; font: 700 14px Manrope, sans-serif; } .ds-amount { width: 100%; padding: 16px; border: 1px solid #DCE3EF; border-radius: 12px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #17233D; font: 700 32px 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-amount:focus { outline: 3px solid rgba(37,89,214,.22); border-color: #2559D6; }

components.name: Workflow Panel
components.description: Groups one coherent financial task without decorative card nesting.
components.html:
Estimated NETF received

2.0450 NETF
components.css: .ds-panel { padding: 24px; border: 1px solid #DCE3EF; border-radius: 16px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #17233D; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(30,49,87,.06); } .ds-panel-label { margin: 0; color: #5F6C86; font: 600 14px Manrope, sans-serif; } .ds-panel-value { display: block; margin-top: 16px; font: 700 32px 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

components.name: Segmented Mode Switch
components.description: Switches paired workflows such as Invest/Redeem and Stake/Unstake.
components.css: .ds-segment { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 4px; padding: 4px; border-radius: 12px; background: #F0F4FB; } .ds-segment button { min-height: 44px; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; background: transparent; color: #5F6C86; font: 700 14px Manrope, sans-serif; } .ds-segment .ds-segment-active { background: #FFFFFF; color: #1746BA; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(23,35,61,.1); }

components.name: Transaction Step
components.description: Makes wallet signature, chain confirmation, and balance synchronization explicit.
components.html:
2
Waiting for confirmation

Transaction submitted to Sepolia
components.css: .ds-step { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 16px; color: #17233D; font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; } .ds-step-icon { display: grid; width: 40px; height: 40px; flex: none; place-items: center; border-radius: 999px; background: #EAF0FF; color: #1746BA; font-weight: 700; } .ds-step strong { font-size: 14px; } .ds-step p { margin: 4px 0 0; color: #5F6C86; font-size: 13px; }

narrative.overview: Neo ETF feels like a well-organized financial ledger translated into a modern product interface. Surfaces are quiet, numbers are decisive, and every transaction has an explicit state. The system avoids ornamental Web3 tropes and lets chain truth lead the hierarchy.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Primary blue is reserved for selection, action, focus, and information rather than ambient decoration.

rules.name: The Data Voice Rule
rules.body: Financial values use stronger weight and tabular alignment than their labels.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Borders and spacing establish hierarchy; elevation is reserved for primary workflow containers and dialogs.

dos: Show wallet balance, selected network, and transaction state before irreversible actions.
Use status icons and text together.
Preserve layout dimensions while chain data loads.
Provide Etherscan evidence for submitted transactions.
donts: Use neon cyberpunk dashboards or purple gradient surfaces.
Hide contract state, transaction progress, or failure causes.
Make ordinary investors decode a terminal-style interface.
